commands.review_summary:
The branch removes the v3.5.3 item from `appcast.xml`, making v3.5.2 the newest Sparkle item, and adds one root `CHANGELOG.md` note.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and the live raw appcast list v3.5.3 first, and the advertised v3.5.3 app zip returns HTTP 404 while the v3.5.2 app zip returns HTTP 200.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human release-owner review is needed because release availability can change before merge and the external proof gate cannot be repaired by an automated code change.

target.title: fix(release): remove appcast entry for unpublished 3.5.3 release
target.body:
## Summary
- Removes the v3.5.3 item from `appcast.xml` because no GitHub release asset exists for that tag
- Sparkle currently offers 3.5.3 to users on 3.5.2, then fails with a 404 when downloading `Peekaboo-3.5.3.app.zip`

## Root cause
Commit `9b9c5de4` added the appcast entry, but `v3.5.3` was never published as a GitHub release (tag exists, release/asset missing).

## Test plan
- [x] `xmllint --noout appcast.xml`
- [x] Parsed the rollback feed: newest item is 3.5.2, the 3.5.2 enclosure returns HTTP 200, and the feed contains zero 3.5.3 items
- [x] Rechecked the removed public 3.5.3 app ZIP URL: HTTP 404
- [x] Merged current `main`, including the timeout-test CI stabilization from #201
- [x] Codex autoreview: no accepted/actionable findings
- [ ] After merge, verify the live `main` feed has the same 3.5.2-first result
- [ ] When 3.5.3 is actually released, re-add the appcast entry via the normal release script

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
target.author: bcharleson
